title: koeleria gracilis subsp. pseudocristata
intro: Koeleria gracilis subsp. pseudocristata is a subspecies of grass in the family Poaceae, native to Central Asia, and is often used in traditional medicine. It possesses medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant is used to alleviate symptoms of various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. It can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture for its medicinal use.
